subtopics.title: Types and Properties of Materials
subtopics.teaching_note: Wood: softwood (pine, used for furniture), hardwood (iroko, mahogany, more durable). Metal: ferrous (iron, steel), non-ferrous (aluminium, copper). Plastic: thermoplastic (meltable, recyclable), thermosetting (rigid, not meltable). Properties: strength, hardness, flexibility, conductivity, durability. Material selection depends on purpose, cost, availability.
